'''Jamur Nath''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] recon [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] in the [[Sons and Daughters of Freedom]]. He and his partner, [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Omin L'Loxx]] fought in the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]]. Nath was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by enemy [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]] while transporting [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Erk H'Arman]] to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Zozridor Slayke]]'s encampment.
